x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: AI Agents orchestrate all automation through Flow Designer subflows. Instances with no active flows cannot leverage Agentic AI for process automation regardless of other configurations.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Create Flow Designer flows for key ITSM and ITOM processes via sys_hub_flow_list.do. Migrate legacy Workflow Engine processes to Flow Designer subflows. Target: 10+ active flows. AI Agents exclusively use Flow Designer for orchestration.
